name: AI Media Generation - Image & Short Video (MinIO + Callback)

parameters.url: ={{ (() => {  const u = ($('Validate Input').first().json.referenceImageUrls[0]) || '';  if (!u.startsWith('gs://')) return u.replace('localhost:9000', 'minio:9000');  const rest = u.slice(5);  const slash = rest.indexOf('/');  if (slash < 0) return u;  const bucket = rest.slice(0, slash);  const obj = rest.slice(slash + 1);  return `https://storage.googleapis.com/storage/v1/b/${bucket}/o/${encodeURIComponent(obj)}?alt=media`;})() }}

={{ (() => {  const u = ($json.gcs_url || $('Evaluate Video Status').last().json.gcs_url) || '';  if (!u.startsWith('gs://')) return u;  const rest = u.slice(5);  const slash = rest.indexOf('/');  if (slash < 0) return u;  const bucket = rest.slice(0, slash);  const obj = rest.slice(slash + 1);  return `https://storage.googleapis.com/storage/v1/b/${bucket}/o/${encodeURIComponent(obj)}?alt=media`;})() }}
